name: Line Change
short_description: Line Change - A 2D pixel side-view game where you draw lines that become bridges from one point to another, allowing three creations to make their way to the finish.
detailed_description:
As a creator and architect of worlds, you must guide your three creations to... the sewers. That's where they belong—these beings didn't turn out as planned, but you'll still need to lead them away from prying eyes.

Line Change - A 2D pixel side-view game where you draw lines that become bridges from one point to another, allowing three creations to make their way to the finish.

Controls:
- Left Mouse Button

Game Features:
- Visual Style
- Physics-based World
- Increasing Difficulty
about_the_game:
As a creator and architect of worlds, you must guide your three creations to... the sewers. That's where they belong—these beings didn't turn out as planned, but you'll still need to lead them away from prying eyes.

Line Change - A 2D pixel side-view game where you draw lines that become bridges from one point to another, allowing three creations to make their way to the finish.

Controls:
- Left Mouse Button

Game Features:
- Visual Style
- Physics-based World
- Increasing Difficulty
